creator: a134qaed@gmail.com
text:
On 1/17/09, miwi@freebsd.org <miwi@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: Update musicpd to 0.14
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Sat Jan 17 11:22:31 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why:
> Ask for maintainer approval.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=130612
>

Fix a bug in the port, as musicpd now depends on glib and
gnome-config; also bump the version up to 1.14.1 which fixes several
stream bugs.
